scripts.prebuild: node scripts/prebuild-netlify-migrations.cjs && node scripts/generate-module-registry.mjs && node scripts/verify-env.mjs --build
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:env && npm run audit:modules && npm run audit:migrations && npm run audit:functions && npm run audit:theme && npm run audit:ux && npm run audit:deadlinks && npm test && npm run build
